sources.title: AN4144 - Field-oriented control using STM32F0 and ST Motor Control SDK
sources.notes: Legacy STM32F0 FOC application note. Useful for MCSDK/FOC concepts, not for STM32G474-specific peripherals.

sources.title: AN5306 - Operational Amplifier (OPAMP) usage in STM32G4 Series
sources.notes: The local file name mentions dual motor control, but the extracted PDF title is AN5306 OPAMP usage in STM32G4 Series. Use it for OPAMP/PGA/current-sense analog front-end concepts.

sources.title: AN5397 - Sensorless PMSM FOC controller
sources.notes: High-value sensorless FOC reference. Use for observer/startup concepts before changing project parameters.

sources.title: NUCLEO-G474RE board brief
sources.notes: Quick board reference for NUCLEO-G474RE. Use with UM2505 for connectors, jumpers, and ST-LINK details.

sources.title: RM0440 - STM32G4 Series reference manual
sources.notes: Highest priority for STM32G4 peripheral behavior: TIM1/TIM8, ADC, DMA, DMAMUX, OPAMP, COMP, CORDIC, FMAC, RCC, GPIO, USART.

sources.title: STM32G474RE datasheet
sources.role: Authoritative MCU electrical and feature reference
sources.notes: Highest priority for STM32G474RE package, pinout, memory, alternate functions, and electrical limits.

sources.title: UM2505 - STM32 Nucleo-64 boards MB1367 user manual
sources.notes: Board-level reference for NUCLEO-64 MB1367: connectors, solder bridges, power, ST-LINK, Arduino and morpho headers.

sources.title: UM3027 - STM32 Motor Control SDK user manual
sources.notes: High-value MCSDK reference for Workbench, Motor Profiler, generated project structure, run-time control, and tuning workflow.
